Class AutomaticVersioning

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.dvs.versioning.AutomaticVersioning
All Implemented Interfaces:
Versioning
Direct Known Subclasses:
BasicVersioning
public class AutomaticVersioning extends Object implements Versioning
Represents automatically supplied versioning information.

  • Constructor Details

    • AutomaticVersioning

      public AutomaticVersioning(@NotNull Pattern pattern, @NotNull Route route)
      Creates automatically supplied versioning information.

      The versions of the respective documents will be obtained and parsed at runtime. Please note that version ID of the defaults must be present and valid, otherwise, a NullPointerException will be thrown. For the document itself, if the version ID is missing or invalid, the updater assigns getFirstVersion() to it.

      Parameters:
      pattern - the pattern used to parse the IDs
      route - the route at which the IDs are

    • AutomaticVersioning

      public AutomaticVersioning(@NotNull Pattern pattern, @NotNull String route)
      Creates automatically supplied versioning information.

      The versions of the respective documents will be obtained and parsed at runtime. Please note that version ID of the defaults must be present and valid, otherwise, a NullPointerException will be thrown. For the document itself, if the version ID is missing or invalid, the updater assigns getFirstVersion() to it.

      Parameters:
      pattern - the pattern used to parse the IDs
      route - the route at which the IDs are

  • Method Details

    • getDocumentVersion

      @Nullable public Version getDocumentVersion(@NotNull Section document, boolean defaults)
      Description copied from interface: Versioning
      Returns version of the given document (section).

      If obtaining version of the defaults (defaults == true), returning null is considered illegal and will throw a NullPointerException. Otherwise, for the document itself, if the version returned is null, the updater assumes Versioning.getFirstVersion().

      Specified by:
      getDocumentVersion in interface Versioning
      Parameters:
      document - the document
      defaults - if getting version of the defaults
      Returns:
      the version corresponding to the document, or null if it could not be obtained/parsed

    • getFirstVersion

      @NotNull public Version getFirstVersion()
      Description copied from interface: Versioning
      Returns the first version specified by the used pattern.
      Specified by:
      getFirstVersion in interface Versioning
      Returns:
      the first version
      See Also:
      • Pattern.getFirstVersion()

    • updateVersionID

      public void updateVersionID(@NotNull Section updated, @NotNull Section def)
      Description copied from interface: Versioning
      Sets version ID of the default section into the updated section content. Called only after successful update.

      Should be used only if the underlying versioning implementation supports file manipulation (AutomaticVersioning).

      Specified by:
      updateVersionID in interface Versioning
      Parameters:
      updated - the updated section
      def - the default section equivalent

    • toString

      public String toString()
